PS-001 SQL injection in login email field ✓ PASS Critical Security 12.4s

PS-017 IDOR — access another user's profile ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —

PS-021 IDOR — delete another org's module via API ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-022 IDOR — access transaction of another user ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —

PS-026 JWT with future iat (issued-at) rejected ⊙ MANUAL High Security —

PS-031 CSRF — forged POST to delete a course ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-032 State-changing operations require CSRF token or SameSite cookie ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-033 X-Frame-Options header prevents admin panel framing ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-034 Attempt to embed admin panel in attacker iframe ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-035 Login endpoint rate limited after N failures ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-036 Forgot password endpoint rate limited ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-037 Invitation send endpoint rate limited ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-038 File upload endpoint rate limited ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-039 API endpoints rate limited per token ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-040 HSTS header enforces HTTPS for 1 year ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-041 X-Content-Type-Options nosniff prevents MIME sniffing ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-042 Referrer-Policy limits referrer leakage ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-043 Permissions-Policy restricts dangerous browser features ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —

PS-045 Polyglot file (valid JPEG + PHP payload) upload ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —

PS-048 SVG with JavaScript event handlers blocked ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —

PS-050 Session fixation — pre-set session ID not accepted after login ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-051 Session invalidated on all devices after password change ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-052 Concurrent login limit (if applicable) ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
PS-053 Mass assignment — cannot elevate role via user update API ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-054 Mass assignment — cannot set is_active via profile API ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-055 HTTP parameter pollution — duplicate params ignored safely ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-056 Open redirect in login redirect parameter ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-057 Open redirect in forgot-password success redirect ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-058 Error messages do not expose stack traces to client ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-059 API does not expose internal server paths in errors ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-060 Password not stored or logged in plaintext ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-061 Sensitive data not in URL query parameters ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-062 LocalStorage/sessionStorage does not hold plaintext credentials ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-063 API versioning error does not disclose internal API routes ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-064 .env or config files not accessible via web ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-065 CORS does not allow wildcard origin on authenticated endpoints ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-066 CORS — credentials not shared with unknown origins ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-067 ReDoS — catastrophic backtracking via email input ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-068 ReDoS — long URL in embed/webhook field ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
PS-069 GraphQL introspection disabled in production ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-070 GraphQL depth limit prevents deeply nested queries ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-071 HTTP TRACE method disabled ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-072 HTTP OPTIONS on API does not expose dangerous methods ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
PS-073 PATCH on read-only resource returns 405 ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
PS-074 Uploaded files accessible only via signed/expiring URLs ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-075 Bulk export does not include other orgs' data ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-076 Admin panel not indexed by search engines ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
PS-077 Sensitive actions require fresh authentication (re-auth) ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-078 Audit log cannot be deleted by any role ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-079 Concurrent bulk delete race condition — count mismatch ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
PS-080 Pagination offset manipulation does not expose extra records ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-081 Insecure deserialization — malformed JSON body handled safely ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-082 Password change invalidates all existing sessions ⊙ MANUAL Critical Security —
PS-083 Sub-domain takeover — dangling CNAME check (if custom domains used) ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-084 Dependency vulnerability — run npm audit or equivalent ⊙ MANUAL High Security —
PS-085 API does not return 200 with error in body (must use proper HTTP codes) ⊙ MANUAL Medium Security —
